summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Finance Board feature for Branch Admin (Iteration 20). All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all components working correctly including 3-tab navigation, summary cards with real data, filter toggles, search functionality, and transactions table. Regression tests for Pipeline and Head Physio Calendar tabs passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Finance Board feature fully implemented with all required functionality
Summary cards correctly display: Total Revenue (Rs.64.0K), Consultation Fees (Rs.4.0K, 8 patients), Package Payments (Rs.60.0K, 4 packages), Pending Collection (5)
Filter toggle works correctly: All (7 rows), Consultation (5 rows), Package (2 rows)
Search filter works for patient name
Transactions table displays all required columns: Patient, Type, Amount, Details, Collected By, Date, Stage
Type badges correctly styled: Package (violet), Consultation (blue)
Total revenue calculation verified: consultation_total + package_total = total_revenue
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing seeded leads with consultation_fee and package_amount values
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 - Finance Board feature testing completed. New feature adds: 1) Finance tab to BranchAdminBoard (now 3 tabs: Pipeline, Head Physio Calendar, Finance), 2) Summary cards showing total revenue, consultation fees, package payments, pending collection, 3) Filter bar with fee_type toggle (All/Consultation/Package), search input, date range inputs, 4) Transactions table with patient info, type badge, amount, details, collected_by, date, stage. Backend endpoint: GET /api/v3/branch/finance with query params: fee_type, start_date, end_date, search. All tests passed. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_finance_board_iteration20.py. Branch Admin credentials: branchadmin@fitsiomax.com / branch123

regression.patient_pipeline_tab: PASS - Kanban board with 8 stages working
